deploy.startCommand: echo 'PORT='$PORT && echo 'DATABASE_URL='$DATABASE_URL && echo 'DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE='$DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE && python manage.py migrate --verbosity 2 2>&1 && echo 'Migrate done, starting gunicorn on port '$PORT && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --log-level info
